name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Flat
description: Badge component with solid styling without border, glow, or heavy depth.

name: Outline
description: Badge component with transparent or low-fill styling with a strong outline treatment.

name: Pill
description: Badge component with fully rounded pill shape for compact labels or actions.

name: Dot indicator
description: Badge component with a leading status dot paired with compact label text.

name: Neobrutalism
description: Badge component with high-contrast neobrutalist styling with hard edges and bold outlines.

name: Soft
description: Badge component with muted background fills and gentle contrast for secondary emphasis.

name: With Icon
description: Badge component with a leading icon paired with the label for quick scanning.

name: Dismissible
description: Badge component with a removable chip pattern with an explicit close action.
